title: Annual tax credits report: 2019 to 2020
body: "HM Revenue and Customs is required under section 40 of the Tax Credits Act 2002 to provide an annual report to the Treasury on:   the number of awards for Child Tax Credit and Working Tax Credit the number of enquiries conducted under section 19 the number of penalties imposed under part 1 the number of prosecutions and convictions for offences connected with tax credits  "
